verses.text: Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy to the church; grace and peace. Greeting. He opens with the customary blessing.
Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy to the church; grace and peace. Greeting. He opens with the customary blessing.
We thank God your faith grows exceedingly; we glory in your patience 'in all your persecutions.' Growing faith. Their endurance is his boast.
We thank God your faith grows exceedingly; we glory in your patience 'in all your persecutions.' Growing faith. Their endurance is his boast.
A token of God's righteous judgment, to 'recompense tribulation to them that trouble you.' Just God. He will repay the persecutors.
A token of God's righteous judgment, to 'recompense tribulation to them that trouble you.' Just God. He will repay the persecutors.
The Lord shall be revealed 'in flaming fire,' taking vengeance on them that know not God. Coming judgment. Christ returns to judge the ungodly.
The Lord shall be revealed 'in flaming fire,' taking vengeance on them that know not God. Coming judgment. Christ returns to judge the ungodly.
The Lord shall be revealed 'in flaming fire,' taking vengeance on them that know not God. Coming judgment. Christ returns to judge the ungodly.
He shall come 'to be glorified in his saints'; we pray God count you worthy of this calling. Glorified in us. The saints will share His glory.
